title: Connection between NGE and RL
wikitext:
[]: Connection between NGE and RL             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Aug 12, 2008 1:56 pm I only have a little bit to type this up but this will be a rather long topic.. Have you ever sat and thought what it would be like if certain things happen like they did in the show... This has happen to everybody..But maybe this can help to say what I have to say. http://highimpacthalo.org/forum/showthread.php?t=32702&highlight=Thoughts+Reality Take some time to read that. This girl visited me in my dreams..i was in my hometown and everybody was in the street sitting at tables happy. The girl walked or rather somewhat floated along side me but her face was blurred out. We walked and talked and I told her I liked this place and did not wish to leave. She told me that she was glad that I was happy and that this was my world but sadly this was not the real world..She told me that I would have to come back to this reality. I tried to stay there by asking her if I could stay but she said I was needed in this world by someone..Who I did not know..She told me it was time to go and pushed me backwards..I feel backwards as I heard her say..goodbye..Wake up..I woke up from the dream in a cold sweat.. I am now dating a girl, the girl who went as Asuka in my cosplay pictures. She goes as her for 2 reasons..She likes how she looks but more..Her back story..My gf lost her mother and her father left her...She hates everyone more or less but me..I'm the only one who has ever cared about her...Is she the reason I could not stay in that world. Did that being in my dreams know of this or is it just all in my head along with those voices that tell me everything I do is wrong more or less like Eva Retake. Now would be the time I tell of all the people and all the girls I've trusted in my life that ran the same scenario of making me trust them only to use me and throw me away but I simply don't have the time. I have a lot to write here on this matter of connections...The Psyche is amazing.. Can a Human become Berserk, I think it can. I have reason to back up my statement. A few years ago I was being shot at by a few people with paintball guns..All I remember is being shot at with high power paintball guns and being up against the wall. I stared to pass out from being scared..I stared to scream but then heard a voice, a loving one..Could have been my mother or someone like that..Then I just remember white out. I remember getting up and looking at them, I or rather just my body stated to run at them..I remember the rounds flying past my face as if I was in third person. I got one and remember strangling him but then let go as the others ran behind a door with a glass window. I remember then breaking the window after a few hits from either a fist or elbow. I then got inside and got my hands on another one of them...I then remember coming two and starting to cry cause I did not know what was going on...I'm not a big strong guy so its not like me to do something like this. I always feel like there's a voice inside that protects..Do you guys have this..I remember walking away crying..They never did that again. This happen one other time when I got into a fight with my friend. All I remember is him hitting me with a piece of wood and me strangling him laughing my head off. Not something you do while being hit by a small 2/4. I have a lot to add when it comes to connections of the human mind and how things from Eva seem to show up in real life since a lot of stuff is based off of real minds. I'm not saying that creating 01 is in the picture or anything like that as cool as that would be but I'm speaking of more of the internal mind happenings that take place within NGE. I have to go see my girlfriend now..Time to get on that train..ttul ps - look up a picture of Pittsburgh PA and tell me it does not look like Tokyo 3. -me

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 12, 2008 2:02 pm ps - look up a picture of Pittsburgh PA and tell me it does not look like Tokyo 3.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Tue Aug 12, 2008 2:02 pm Yes it does.

[]: Re: Connection between NGE and RL             Quote Post by swamp147 » Tue Aug 12, 2008 2:05 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: Can a Human become Berserk, I think it can. I have reason to back up my statement.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 12, 2008 2:08 pm Yes, and it is said that when you are in that sort of state, your brain will increase your image processing FPS, and time will seem like it is slowing down for you. I watched that Incredible Human Machine show on the National Geographic Channel and it told of that phenomenon.

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Tue Aug 12, 2008 2:09 pm No, too many bridges, too many trees, too much water in general. Tyokyo III is nice and clean, but its not that nice and clean. YOU SIR ARE LUCKY. Denver is always covered in a thin layer of smog from cars. :( EDIT: well, maybe just a little more than that, anyway. On the other hand, having the mountains visible from all points around the city is pretty spectacular.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 12, 2008 2:12 pm Hmmm, I may start a new thread due to this subtopic.......

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Tue Aug 12, 2008 2:32 pm I think there was a special on Sceience Channel not too long ago about how the human body could have super human abilities under the right cirumstances. I think it was called "The Human Body" =P

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 12, 2008 2:33 pm Yes, I saw that one too. The human body is one truly amazing thing!

[]:             Quote Post by Omegagouki » Tue Aug 12, 2008 3:46 pm People can also go berserk from the use of PCP and some other narcotics. Oh, and 'roid rage from steroid use.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 12, 2008 3:48 pm yes, but I don't think that evas are on the juice

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Aug 13, 2008 9:00 am And it also matters if you believe in a Soul or not...I wish I started posting on this site a while ago..I have so much information to say.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaque » Fri Aug 15, 2008 1:22 am Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: And it also matters if you believe in a Soul or not...

[]:             Quote Post by swamp147 » Fri Aug 15, 2008 4:56 am Zaque wrote: Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: And it also matters if you believe in a Soul or not...

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Fri Aug 15, 2008 7:22 am ^^ Nice post my friend I have to do a large write up on this but not right now..time for school but I'll update when I can.

[]: Re: Connection between NGE and RL             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Fri Aug 15, 2008 11:06 am Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: Can a Human become Berserk, I think it can.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri Aug 15, 2008 11:13 am Yeah, I thought that the paintball thing was pretty crazy when I first read it.

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Fri Aug 15, 2008 11:47 am In a game where there are refs everywhere to such an extent that they have to be careful not to give away peoples positions, there is absolutely no way he could get away with that kind of assault. He's bullshitting us, and its not impressive. Its just LAME.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Fri Aug 15, 2008 12:02 pm What Nooo no nonooo it was not a Scenario paintball game! It was in the back yard of this mean kids house! Big sorry for the confusion...I'm not one to lie...Steve is just an ass. one of those people who is nice to you when no one else is around but an ass to you when they are. -edit- Now I feel really bad like you guys don't trust me..I'm sorry for the mix up truly..Don't think me wrong alright..

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Aug 15, 2008 12:17 pm That's not real paintball -- *this* is real paintball http://www.chaospaintball.co.uk/armourgeddon.php Also, tangent over, folks.
